2075	    async _call(images, {
2076	        top_k = 5
2077	    } = {}) {
2078	
2079	        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
2080	
2081	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
2082	        const output = await this.model({ pixel_values });
2083	
2084	        // @ts-expect-error TS2339
2085	        const id2label = this.model.config.id2label;
2086	
2087	        /** @type {ImageClassificationOutput[]} */
2088	        const toReturn = [];
2089	        for (const batch of output.logits) {
2090	            const scores = await topk(new Tensor(
2091	                'float32',
2092	                softmax(batch.data),
2093	                batch.dims,
2094	            ), top_k);
2095	
2096	            const values = scores[0].tolist();
2097	            const indices = scores[1].tolist();
2098	
2099	            const vals = indices.map((x, i) => ({
2100	                label: /** @type {string} */ (id2label ? id2label[x] : `LABEL_${x}`),
2101	                score: /** @type {number} */ (values[i]),
2102	            }));
2103	            toReturn.push(vals);
2104	        }
2105	
2106	        return Array.isArray(images) ? toReturn : toReturn[0];

---

## Plan: `image-text-to-text` Pipeline

### What's being added and why

`AutoModelForImageTextToText` already exists in `src/models.js` (line 8736), supporting LLaVA, SmolVLM, PaliGemma, Florence-2, and more. The only missing piece is the pipeline layer. **Only `src/pipelines.js` needs to be edited** (plus one new test file). Nothing else changes.

### 5 precise changes

| # | File | Change | Location |
|---|------|--------|----------|
| 1 | `src/pipelines.js` | Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the `./models.js` import | After line 43 |
| 2 | `src/pipelines.js` | Insert JSDoc typedefs + `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class | After line 2005 (end of `ImageToTextPipeline`) |
| 3 | `src/pipelines.js` | Add `"image-text-to-text"` entry to `SUPPORTED_TASKS` | After line 3255 (after `"image-to-text"`) |
| 4 | `src/pipelines.js` | Add task to `pipeline()` JSDoc list | ~Line 3427 |
| 5 | `tests/pipelines/test_pipelines_image_text_to_text.js` | New test file (auto-discovered) | (new) |

### Key design decisions

- **`_call(images, texts, generate_kwargs)`** — processes one image+text pair at a time in a loop (same as `ImageToTextPipeline`), because processors like `LlavaProcessor` need to expand `<image>` tokens in the prompt per-call.
- **Prompt-token slicing** — `output.slice(null, [inputs.input_ids.dims[1], null])` strips the prompt from the output before decoding. - **Both `tokenizer` and `processor`** in `SUPPORTED_TASKS` — processor handles image+text preprocessing together; tokenizer is used separately for `batch_decode` on the generated tokens.
- **Default model**: `HuggingFaceTB/SmolVLM-256M-Instruct` (smallest production VLM with ONNX support).
- **Test model**: `Xenova/tiny-random-LlavaForConditionalGeneration` (already confirmed working in `tests/models/llava/test_modeling_llava.js`).

## Plan: `image-text-to-text` Pipeline

### What's being added and why

`AutoModelForImageTextToText` already exists in `src/models.js` (line 8736), supporting LLaVA, SmolVLM, PaliGemma, Florence-2, and more. The only missing piece is the pipeline layer. **Only `src/pipelines.js` needs to be edited** (plus one new test file). Nothing else changes.

### 5 precise changes

| # | File | Change | Location |
|---|------|--------|----------|
| 1 | `src/pipelines.js` | Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the `./models.js` import | After line 43 |
| 2 | `src/pipelines.js` | Insert JSDoc typedefs + `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class | After line 2005 (end of `ImageToTextPipeline`) |
| 3 | `src/pipelines.js` | Add `"image-text-to-text"` entry to `SUPPORTED_TASKS` | After line 3255 (after `"image-to-text"`) |
| 4 | `src/pipelines.js` | Add task to `pipeline()` JSDoc list | ~Line 3427 |
| 5 | `tests/pipelines/test_pipelines_image_text_to_text.js` | New test file (auto-discovered) | (new) |

### Key design decisions

- **`_call(images, texts, generate_kwargs)`** — processes one image+text pair at a time in a loop (same as `ImageToTextPipeline`), because processors like `LlavaProcessor` need to expand `<image>` tokens in the prompt per-call.
- **Prompt-token slicing** — `output.slice(null, [inputs.input_ids.dims[1], null])` strips the prompt from the output before decoding. This is essential because `AutoModelForImageTextToText` models are **decoder-only** (unlike `AutoModelForVision2Seq` encoder-decoders used by `image-to-text`, which never include the prompt in their output).
- **Both `tokenizer` and `processor`** in `SUPPORTED_TASKS` — processor handles image+text preprocessing together; tokenizer is used separately for `batch_decode` on the generated tokens.
- **Default model**: `HuggingFaceTB/SmolVLM-256M-Instruct` (smallest production VLM with ONNX support).
- **Test model**: `Xenova/tiny-random-LlavaForConditionalGeneration` (already confirmed working in `tests/models/llava/test_modeling_llava.js`).
